description: Generate PDF reports from ReportFlow templates via Claude and other AI agents.
name: io.github.re-port-flow/reportflow-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Override default OAuth client_id (optional, defaults to the official public client 'reportflow-mcp')
environmentVariables.name: REPORTFLOW_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Override default ReportFlow auth URL (optional, defaults to https://re-port-flow.com/api/v1)
environmentVariables.name: REPORTFLOW_AUTH_URL

environmentVariables.description: Override default ReportFlow Content Service URL (optional, defaults to https://api.re-port-flow.com)
environmentVariables.name: REPORTFLOW_API_BASE_URL

title: ReportFlow
